articles.title: Meta and Google found liable in landmark social media addiction trial
articles.summary: The verdict marks the end of a five-week trial on the addictive nature of social media platforms.

articles.title: UN votes to recognise slavery as 'gravest crime against humanity'
articles.summary: The landmark resolution calls for an apology and contributions to a reparations fund, without specifying an amount.
